name: Arn Media Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 50% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2900, stop A$0.2029, target A$0.3400 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
